title: M&SENSE 290g Soy Scented Candles ​Coconut Lime&Apricot - 55 Hours Long Burning, Natural Non-Toxic Glass Jar Candle, Aromatherapy for Relaxing, Luxury Birthday/Mother's Day Gifts for Women
features: 【Premium Soy Candle with 55-Hour Burn】Crafted from natural soy wax and a lead-free cotton wick, this 260g scented candle delivers a smokeless, even 55-hour long burning. Infused with essential oils, it doubles as an aromatherapy candle for stress relief and relaxation.

【Summer Breeze Aromatherapy】Our seasonal candles capture the vibrant essence of sun-kissed blooms and zesty botanicals. The long-burning soy wax gradually releases refreshing fragrance oils, transforming your space into a summer garden retreat ideal for brunch gatherings, poolside relaxation, or outdoor yoga. Perfect for creating a fresh ambiance during garden parties or as a thoughtful gift for summer birthdays.

【Natural Non-Toxic & Eco-Friendly】Certified non toxic candles free from parabens, phthalates, and paraffin. Our eco-friendly formula meets safety standards, with the sturdy glass jar preventing wax leakage during burning—ideal for families with children or pets.

【Luxury Scented Candles Gift】Crafted with reinforced thick-walled glass, this scented candle ensures extended burn time and enhanced safety for worry-free use. The weighty, reusable jar adds a touch of refined elegance to interiors while prioritising durability – impeccably packaged for effortless gifting on birthdays, Mother’s Day, anniversaries or as thoughtful housewarming presents

【Crafted by M&Sense Since 2009】As experts in soy candle craftsmanship, we've specialized in creating candles gifts that combine artistry and functionality. With sturdy thick-walled cup design, this candle is a thoughtful surprise for candle enthusiasts and collectors alike.
